content.full_text:
STATE OF CALIFOJUH-A 
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION 
· 1102 Q Street • Suite 3000 • Sacramento, CA 95811 
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886 
Nancy Diamond 
City Attorney 
City of Arcata 
822 G Street, Suite 3 
Arcata, CA 95527 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our File No. W-17-293 
December 27, 2017 
This letter responds to your request for advice on behalf of Arcata City Council Member 
Michael Winkler regarding the conflict of interest provisions of the Political Refonn Act and • 
Government Code Section 1090. 
The Act requires the Commission to provide written advice to any person whose duties 
under the Act are in question or to that person's authorized representative. (Section 83114(b); 
Regulation 18329(a).) Additionally, "A person subject to Section 1090 may request the [Fair 
Political Practices] Commission to issue an opinion or advice with respect to his or her duties under 
Section 1090 .... " However, the Commission will decline to give advice where the question 
involves conduct that has already occurred. (Regulation l 8329(b)(8)(A).) 
After a careful review of the facts you provided, Councilmember Winkler has been 
previously involved in discussions regarding the Village project in his capacity as a city council 
member. Accordingly, we must decline to provide written advice at this time. 
If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660. 
Assistant General Counsel 
BGL:jgl

sections.conclusion: After a careful review of the facts you provided, Councilmember Winkler has been previously involved in discussions regarding the Village project in his capacity as a city council member. Accordingly, we must decline to provide written advice at this time.
sections.question_synthetic: Whether Arcata City Council Member Michael Winkler had conflicts of interest under the Political Reform Act and Government Code Section 1090 regarding involvement in the Village project.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC declines to provide written advice because Councilmember Winkler has already been previously involved in discussions regarding the Village project, and the Commission does not provide advice on conduct that has already occurred.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document is a declination letter (W-17-293). No explicit QUESTION or CONCLUSION headers found; conclusion text extracted from substantive body. File number format (W-) suggests withdrawal or declination classification.

embedding.summary: The FPPC declines to provide written advice to the City of Arcata regarding conflicts of interest issues for Councilmember Michael Winkler related to the Village project, citing the regulation that prohibits advice on conduct that has already occurred.
